failure_reason: Corrected the selector registry from mutable known-language bindings to plugin registration. A grammar plugin now carries its capsule, dialect, surfaces, capability kinds, and selector list as Form data; registering one plugin installs one capsule and all selectors. The selector proof passes at 17100 in source and binary modes and includes a runtime-loaded dialect that was not pre-wired into registry dispatch.
